tryeditor.timeout: Code execution took too long and was stopped. There may be an infinite loop or heavy computation. Please check your code!
tryeditor.noOutput: Your code produced no output. Use console.log or check your code.
tryeditor.tooManyLogs: Too many operations: More than 5 console.log calls were made and execution was stopped.
tryeditor.unsupported: Execution is not supported for this language.
